name: The After Shave with Danny Beard
original_name: The After Shave with Danny Beard
overview: Danny Beard commiserates with the queens who sashayed away from RuPaul's Drag Race UK. They chat lewks, gags, shade... and spill the tea about what went on in the werk room.

trailers.title: The After Shave With Danny Beard | Drag Race UK After Show Trailer 🇬🇧
